Read the proof of `https://t.co/h6ZxP7…

Most people use Claude Code like a chat box.

It's actually a 7-layer system. Each layer compounds on the one below it.

The bottom layer (CLAUDE. md) is where 90% of users stop. The top layer (Subagents) is where the real leverage starts.

Here's the full stack, from foundation https://t.co/N80bdqNfa7

Turn your name into a luxury editorial collage inspired by you ✨

Every letter of your name becomes a different version of you.

Drop yours if you try it.

Prompt 👇 https://t.co/ashjymLfau

Change “NAME” to your name and use a reference image of you. I used my pfp. Also modify colors if you want. 

Create a luxury editorial name collage using the uploaded reference photo as the likeness guide. Spell the name: [KRIS] Use large, bold, clean block letters centered on a
